children.name: API 9: Incentive Eligibility and Fuel Allowance
Full Payment Flow — Inflow → Outflow (Used Vehicle / Disbursed)
finds an eligible lead and opens the payments page
verifies the inflow and confirms success
raises an outflow for the captured RC number
fills receiver details and submits bank info
uploads all required documents and approves payment type
enters retail hold amount, freezes it and approves Verify 1
adds a remark and approves Verify 2
uploads payment proof and approves payment
closes the payment and verifies success
